data.name: PlaceNotValid
data.value: Place of file is not valid.

data.name: FilePalceNotValid
data.value: Place of file is not valid.

data.name: FileNotValid
data.value: File has incorrect extension or does not exist

data.name: NotFoundExceptionMessage
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: PasswordValid
data.value: Password may be weak. Or it doesn't accepted cause of criteria.

data.name: PasswordValid
data.value: Password may be weak. Or it doesn't accepted cause of criteria.

data.name: PasswordConfirmNotEqual
data.value: Password confirmation value not equals to password value.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password minimum length must be 8 characters.

data.name: FailedSignUp
data.value: Failed to sign up that user.

data.name: UniversityCodeMultipleAttemps
data.value: Unable to generate unique university code after multiple attempts.

data.name: UniversityEmailMultipleAttemps
data.value: Unable to generate unique university email after multiple attempts.

data.name: PrimayRoleInvalid
data.value: Primary role must be a valid role type.

data.name: AdditionalRolesInvalid
data.value: All additional roles must be a valid role type.

data.name: EmailNotFoundBefore
data.value: User email is not found before.

data.name: PasswordResetTemplate
data.value:
Password Reset

Hello, @(Model.FullName) !

You have requested to reset your password for Rafeek. To reset your password, please use the following reset code:

Reset Code: @(Model.VerificationCode)

If you didn't request this password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

Regards,

The Rafeek Team

data.name: ResetTokenInvalid
data.value: Invalid or expired password reset token.

data.name: SendUserCredentialsTemplate
data.value:
Welcome to Rafeek University System

Hello, @(Model.FullName) !

Your account has been successfully created. Below are your login credentials:

University Email: @(Model.Email)

Temporary Password: @(Model.Password)

Important: For security reasons, please change your password after your first login.

You can now access the Rafeek University System using these credentials.

If you did not request this account, please contact support immediately.

Regards,

The Rafeek Team

data.name: SendUserCredentialsMessage
data.value: User credentials sent successfully to email.

data.name: MaxLengthOfEventNameExceededRequiredLength
data.value: Event name is exceeded the required length.

data.name: MaxLengthOfLocationExceededRequiredLength
data.value: Location of event must not exceeded the required length.

data.name: EndTimeMustBeGreaterThanStartTime
data.value: End time must be greater that a start time.

data.name: EndDateMustBeGreaterThanOrEqualEventDate
data.value: End date must be greater that or equal event date.

data.name: RecurrenceEndDateMustBeAfterEventDate
data.value: Recurrence end date must be after event date.

data.name: CourseIdRequiredForExamEvent
data.value: Course Id required for exam event.

data.name: AddedFailed
data.value: Failed to added a new record.

data.name: UpdatedFailed
data.value: Failed to updated a new record.

data.name: DeletedFailed
data.value: Failed to deleted a new record.

data.name: StartDateRequired
data.value: Start date of academic year is required.

data.name: EndDateRequired
data.value: End date of academic year is required.

data.name: EndDateMustBeGreaterThanStartDate
data.value: End date of academic year must be greater than start date.

data.name: AcademicYearNotFound
data.value: This Academic year is not found in our system.

data.name: AcademicTermEndDateRequired
data.value: Academic term end date is required.

data.name: EndDateMustBeGreaterThanStartDate
data.value: Academic term end date must be greater than start date.

data.name: RegisterationEndDateMustBeGreaterThanRegistrationStartDate
data.value: Academic term registration end date must be greater than registration start date.

data.name: ExamEndDateMustBeGreaterThanExamStartDate
data.value: Academic term exam end date must be greater than exam start date.

data.name: RegistrationStartDateMustBeGreaterThanAcademicTermStartDate
data.value: Academic term registration start date must be greater than academic term start date.

data.name: ExamStartDateMustBeGreaterThanRegistrationStartDate
data.value: Academic term exam start date must be greater than registration start date.

data.name: AcademicTermNotFound
data.value: Academic term is not found in our system.

data.name: StudentsNotFound
data.value: That student list IDs are not found.

data.name: YouAreNotAdvisorOfThatStudent
data.value: The guidance request either not exist, or the current request status is not pending, or that student is not under your advisement.

data.name: TitleRequired
data.value: Title of guidence request is required.

data.name: DescriptionRequired
data.value: Description of guidence request is required.

data.name: RequestIsSentSuccessfully
data.value: Guidence support request is sent successfully.

data.name: RequestIsFailedToSend
data.value: Guidence support request is failed to send.

data.name: DepartmentNameMaxLength
data.value: Max length of department name must not exceeded 100 character.

data.name: DepartmentCodeMaxLength
data.value: Department code must not exceed 10 characters.

data.name: DepartmentCodeUnique
data.value: Department code must not found before.

data.name: UserNotEligibleForDepartment
data.value: This user type cannot be assigned to a department.

data.name: CourseAssignedSuccessfully
data.value: Course has been assigned to the department successfully.

data.name: UserAssignedSuccessfully
data.value: User has been assigned to the department successfully.

data.name: CourseRemovedSuccessfully
data.value: Course has been removed from the department successfully.

data.name: UserRemovedSuccessfully
data.value: User has been removed from the department successfully.

data.name: UserRoleNotFound
data.value: Could not find a specific academic role (Student/Doctor/Instructor) for this user.

data.name: UserNotInDepartment
data.value: User is not assigned to any department.
